synthetic_note: The test project does not have Anthropic-on-Vertex enabled (live attempts 404 at the model-availability gate before reaching message validation). The request.json above is a real recording of what the lib's `convert_request` produces post-fix (memo as user turn, then live user turn — Anthropic merges consecutive same-role turns server-side). The response.sse is hand-authored in Anthropic's documented Messages streaming format (message_start → content_block_start/delta/stop → message_delta → message_stop) so the lib's parser can replay it deterministically. Replace with a real capture via `cargo run --example capture_traces -- anthropic post_compaction_continuation` when a project with Anthropic-on-Vertex access is available.
